settings.heading: Feed your crafty obsession!
settings.text: By joining our loyalty program, you’ll earn points to unlock exclusive perks.

settings.heading: Club Inspire Tiers
settings.header_text:
Unlock a world of discounts, exclusive perks and previews of brand new exciting products with Club Inspire. Level up every time you order and work your way up the membership tier, saving more on each level.

Start your Club Inspire journey today with our Pearl membership, before moving to Bronze, Silver, Gold and finally Platinum for 20% off on every order!
settings.promo_heading: All Club Inspire members get exclusive discounts and previews of our new product launches.

settings.faq_footer_text: For more information, please contact us.
